conversation.content:
Hi Kapil, thanks for coming in today.  It's great to finally meet you.  Your resume is impressive, particularly your experience as CTO at Aero Touch and your award-winning work on the PSR Image Denoising project.  The Mark Mate project also caught my eye – automating teacher grading is a very innovative application of your skills.

To start, could you please tell me a bit about yourself, your background, and what specifically interests you about this opportunity?
